description: In this episode of Chewing Glass, Chris Heaney, a core contributor to Drift Protocol, discusses his journey into software development and the Solana ecosystem. He shares insights on his early career in management consulting and his transition to programming, emphasizing the importance of entrepreneurship and learning to code.
topic_summary: Chris Heaney's background in software development and his contributions to the Solana ecosystem, including his experiences in management consulting and entrepreneurship [t=0:43].
